prompts.intro: Look at the three pictures. Write the story shown in the pictures.

pics.label: Picture 1
pics.text: a boy finds a lost dog in the park

pics.label: Picture 2
pics.text: the boy looks at the dog's collar and reads the address

pics.label: Picture 3
pics.text: the boy returns the dog to a happy family

prompts.intro: Look at the three pictures. Write the story shown in the pictures.

prompts.intro: Look at the three pictures. Write the story shown in the pictures.
